message:
feat: full Excalidraw property surface, cloud palettes, and editing capabilities

- Expand types with FillStyle, StrokeStyle, FontFamily, Arrowhead, TextAlign, VerticalAlign
- Add 18 cloud color palettes (AWS, Azure, GCP, K8s)
- Wire all Excalidraw properties through buildElements (fillStyle, roughness, opacity, etc.)
- Add addText() for standalone text and addLine() for dividers
- Add editing: Diagram.fromFile(), findByLabel(), updateNode(), removeNode(), removeEdge()
- Add sidecar .drawmode.ts source code storage alongside .excalidraw files
- Expand SDK_TYPES and draw_info with full type surface and editing examples
- Add 19 new tests (45 total passing)

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,3 @@
 name = "drawmode"
 main = "index.ts"
 compatibility_date = "2024-12-01"
-
-[build]
-command = "npx tsc --outDir dist worker/index.ts --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck"
